name: Satia Industries Limited
summary: Satia Industries Limited manufactures and sells writing and printing paper in India and internationally. The company operates through Paper, Yarn and Cotton, Cogeneration, Agriculture, and Solar divisions. It offers snow white, super snow white, map litho, colored, ledger, cartridge, duplicating, bond, water mark, and chromo papers for use in the printing of text books, note books, directories, envelops, diaries, calendars, computer stationery, etc. The company is also involved in the generation of solar power; trading of cotton and yarns; and agricultural and plantation operations. Satia Industries Limited also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Satia Paper Mills Limited. Satia Industries Limited was incorporated in 1980 and is headquartered in Sri Muktsar Sahib, India.
